message:
fix(db): harden cache invalidation, search cache keys, and reservation releases

Cache:
- Replace match-on-Option with is_some_and/if-let for idiomatic expiry checks
- Use is_multiple_of() instead of modulo for hit sampling
- Fix agent invalidation to clear stale id-index entries even when
  key-index entry is already missing (scan by scope + name fallback)
- Add tests for orphaned id-index cleanup and multi-id invalidation

Queries:
- Replace INSERT OR REPLACE + RETURNING with eligibility check + INSERT
  OR IGNORE for file reservation releases (frankensqlite compat)
- Add missing inbox_stats table setup in rebuild_inbox_stats_chunks test

Search:
- Include explain mode and engine discriminator in search cache keys to
  prevent cross-contamination between explain/non-explain and different
  engine results
- Gate hybrid_budget_governor_config_from_env behind cfg(feature="hybrid")
- Relax importance filter: High+Urgent now maps to High (adjacent upper)
- Update cache_golden.json fixture for new cache key distribution

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
